Choose whether this destination is for b: Choose whether this destination is for backup or clone
In a read-only destination you only will: In a read-only destination you only will be able to restore and download existing backups. No write to this destination will be allowed
Specify the owner of this destination. T: Specify the owner of this destination. The owner and his parent will have permissions to modify/delete this destination
This destination will be installed on th: This destination will be installed on this server!
This option is for setting the maximum a: This option is for setting the maximum allowed number of concurrent tasks (Download/Upload/Delete) that will be performed simultaneously on this destination. This number will be divided by the total number of forks (backup, queueable and system forks combined) defined in performance settings.
This option will check if destination di: This option will check if destination disk space reached the specified limit before it performs the backup. If you enable this option and available disk space is less than the amount specified, the system will not perform the backup.
This will be used internally for your co: This will be used internally for your convenience
